recommendations.title: Conduct Comprehensive ESG Disclosure Gap Analysis
recommendations.description: Initiate a detailed gap analysis of YES Bank's ESG disclosures against BRSR and GRI frameworks to identify and address non-disclosure areas before the FY26 filing deadline.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid potential cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps, saving approximately ₹30-60 Cr annually on borrowing costs.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India improved disclosures leading to ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Publish TCFD-Aligned Climate Risk Report
recommendations.description: Develop and publish a TCFD-aligned report including Scope 3 financed emissions to enhance transparency and attract ESG-focused investors.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential to attract ₹1000-1500 Cr in ESG-mandated FII inflows, increasing valuation premium by 5-10%.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: SBI's TCFD report led to CDP B rating and ₹3000 Cr inflows

recommendations.title: Enhance Corporate Governance Transparency
recommendations.description: Strengthen governance disclosures in quarterly SEBI Corporate Governance reports to address minor governance concerns and improve ESG rating.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved governance can reduce reputational risk and lower cost of capital by 10-15 bps, saving ₹15-25 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Launch ESG Investor Engagement Program
recommendations.description: Proactively engage ESG-focused investors through webinars and disclosures to mitigate passive fund outflows and improve trust scores.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing fund outflows by 5% can preserve ₹500 Cr in AUM, maintaining fee income and valuation.

immediate_high.title: Conduct Comprehensive ESG Disclosure Gap Analysis
